title: VelesMist price cache v1
description: Stable local/manual price input contract. Prices are keyed by Steam market_hash_name and represent gross buyer-facing prices before VelesMist estimates fees and seller receive.
$comment: Unsupported schema_version, missing required top-level fields, unknown fields, or entries with no price field are invalid. Items without a matching market_hash_name key are reported as missing_price during scan output.

schema_version.description: Required schema marker. Unsupported schema versions fail as invalid input.

currency.description: Currency label used for local/manual prices and report output.

prices.description: Object keyed by Steam market_hash_name. Missing item keys produce missing_price scan rows.

confidence.description: Optional confidence metadata for future or external tooling. The current scorer treats local cache prices as medium confidence and missing prices as none.

liquidity_score.description: Optional liquidity metadata for future or external tooling. The current scorer emits 0 because live liquidity is not implemented.
